query:
UPDATE calls c
JOIN team_members tm ON c.teamMemberId = tm.id
SET c.tenantId = tm.tenantId
WHERE c.tenantId IS NULL AND tm.tenantId IS NOT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute UPDATE calls c
JOIN team_members tm ON c.teamMemberId = tm.id
SET c.tenantId = tm.tenantId
WHERE c.tenantId IS NULL AND tm.tenantId IS NOT NULL;
